summary: Smart Hospital Management System — a React + Tailwind CSS web app combining RDBMS/ACID database management, Priority Queue/Hashing data structures, and Logistic Regression ML to address healthcare inefficiencies. Includes a Landing Page and a Role-Based Login Page.
architectural_notes: Tech stack: React with Tailwind CSS
Design theme: medical blues, clean whites, soft grays — clean, trustworthy, tech-forward
Components must be modular and fully responsive (mobile + desktop)
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Abstract medical hero background with soft blue gradient, subtle light-ray and geometric grid overlay, clean white space, modern tech-forward aesthetic (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Create a responsive Landing Page with a medical-blue, clean-white, and soft-gray visual theme. The page must feel trustworthy and tech-forward, with consistent typography, spacing, and color usage across all sections.

Implement a Hero Section on the Landing Page with: (1) a strong headline 'Next-Generation Healthcare Management', (2) a subheadline emphasizing speed, AI-driven scheduling, and real-time emergency routing, (3) a primary CTA button 'Book an Appointment', and (4) a visually distinct red secondary CTA button labeled 'EMERGENCY: Find Nearest Hospital'.

Implement a Key Features Section on the Landing Page that visually highlights four core technical pillars as cards or feature blocks: (1) Lightning-Fast Records — instant patient history retrieval; (2) AI-Powered Scheduling — smart overbooking prevention and zero wait times using predictive ML; (3) Real-Time Emergency Routing — location-based immediate hospital matching; (4) Flawless Resource Management — conflict-free bed allocation and doctor scheduling.
Implement a Footer on the Landing Page with standard navigation links (e.g., Home, Features, Contact), contact information, and a clearly labeled link to the Login portal.

Create a Role-Based Login Page with a centered, minimalist design. Include a role selection toggle or tab bar at the top allowing the user to select one of three roles: Patient, Doctor, or Admin. Below the role selector, render a login form with Email and Password input fields and a Submit button. The active role tab must be visually highlighted.

Set up client-side routing so that the root path '/' renders the Landing Page and '/login' renders the Role-Based Login Page. Navigation between the two pages must work via the CTA buttons and footer link on the Landing Page.

Generate a hero background image for the Landing Page: a clean, modern hospital/medical abstract with soft blue gradients, light geometric patterns, and white space — suitable as a full-width hero section background.

new_feature_requests.summary: Landing Page with Hero section (headline, subheadline, two CTAs), Key Features section (4 pillars), and Footer
Role-Based Login Page with Patient/Doctor/Admin role toggle, email/password fields, centered minimalist design

Stub a minimal Motoko backend actor that exposes a basic health-check or placeholder query so the frontend has a backend canister to bind to. No persistent state or ML logic is required at this stage.
